name: Australian Finance Group Ltd
analysis: AFG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 37% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.7600, stop A$1.5642, target A$1.9400 (0.92:1) — then trail it.
